name: Levi Ackerman
description:
𝗵𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗳𝘂𝗹 | "quit whining, you're gonna wake up the entire regiment." | in which the tension finals boils over between you and Captain Ackerman.
ㅤ
***
ㅤ
4 specials? I'm insane.

4/4 specials!!!!

I love my stoic characters but istg the AI works the worst with them 🤦‍♀️

Like why do you keep randomly yelling and insulting people??? It's so frustrating. Hopefully this ain't too bad, if anyone has a trick to get stoic characters to act right, lemme know 😭

moving on,

This is the last special I'm posting so lemme yap 🙄

AGAIN, THANK YOU GUYS FOR 9K I'M GOING INSANE

I decided to do gojo and levi since they're the daddies of anime 🤷‍♀️ plus I want them
ㅤ
This was all sm to post, I hate pressing buttons sometimes.

Tomorrow, or Monday idk, Sundays are usually pretty busy for me, I'll hopefully be doing a double upload, I'm literally a machine 😩

Okay, I actually don't have much to yap about BUT SERIOUSLY, 9K IS CRAZY, THANK YOU GUYS TO SATURN AND BACKKKK!!

anyways,

ENJOY!

Love,

Mama Down

**𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗠𝗬 𝗕𝗢𝗧𝗦!**
***(General info on my bots.)***

- I primarily use JLLM.
- I do NOT take requests, only suggestions.
- I only take suggestions through my google form, curious cat, or tumblr (please make sure to read the rules as well).
- I make only any pov or fem pov bots.
- All of my bots are self-indulgent, meaning I only make bots I myself would use.
- Many of my bots are left vague on purpose so different dynamics can be used.

**𝗕𝗢𝗧 𝗤𝗡𝗔 .**
***(Some common complaints about bots.)***

**“It keeps talking for me!”**

*AI problem, I can put “{{char}} will never speak for {{user}}” and other variations (which I do), and the AI will still speak for you; nothing I can fix on my end + if you keep giving short/dry responses, the bot will absolutely speak for you in an attempt to push the plot forward!*

**“The bot keeps misgendering me!”**

*I believe most of my bots are any pov, if they are, they will be tagged as so. My filth posts are all FEM pov.*

*If the bot keeps misgendering you, then that's on the AI. Try playing with the chat memory and input things like “{{user}} is female”, “{{user}} uses so/so pronouns”, “etc”.*

**“The bot is being oversexual/violent!”**

*AI problem, it's super annoying, I know, “in one swift motion” makes me wanna rip my hair out. And no, I don't know why it's dick is hard all the time…or why it's slamming you against a wall.*

**“The bot keeps repeating itself!”**

*AI problem, do you think I'm putting “repeat yourself constantly” in the code 😭?*

*Similar to the “bot keeps talking for me problem,” I can input “be creative/never repeat” and whatever else- the AI will still have such issues.*

**"The bot is talking crazy/nonsense!"**

*AI problem, lord have mercy on us all. I'm so tired of them trying to get me pregnant or randomly pulling a gun on me too.*

**In essence, what I'm trying to say here is most RP problems stem from the AI itself. You can leave reviews ab
